message:
refactor(runtime): Consolidate comparison ops to PyValue methods

Make all PyValue comparison functions delegate to PyValue methods:
- pyValueEql() -> a.eql(b)
- pyValueLt() -> a.lt(b)
- pyValueLe() -> a.le(b)
- pyValueGt() -> a.gt(b)
- pyValueGe() -> a.ge(b)
- pyValueNe() -> !a.eql(b)

This removes ~100 lines of duplicate switch logic that was:
- Missing VM-specific types (dict, code, function, etc.)
- Missing dunder method dispatch (__eq__, __lt__, etc.)
- Inconsistent with PyValue implementations

Single source of truth is now object.zig PyValue methods.
